#daniel-search

Personal portfolio search experience

Suggestions

6

Add 'At a Glance' credibility bar

H

Horizontal micro-stats row below hero: years coding, projects shipped, current role, focus area. Pill/badge style.

social-proofhomepage

Add external links to project cards

H

Render href (live demo) and repo (GitHub) links on ItemCard. Arrow + GitHub icons. Hover: muted → foreground.

social-proofprojects

Add 'Currently At' Amazon badge

H

Small pill near hero: 'Currently: GM Assistant @ Amazon · Miami, FL'. Briefcase icon optional.

social-proofhomepage

Add 'Built with' tech logo strip

H

Horizontal strip: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Vercel, Local LLMs. Grayscale, muted opacity, hover full.

social-proofhomepage

Add quantifiable metrics to descriptions

D

Update data.ts with numbers: '500+ daily interactions', '$X/month processed', '95+ Lighthouse'.

social-proofcopy

Add testimonial / endorsement section

D

Blockquote with third-party quote. Left border foreground, italic muted. Even one quote beats zero.
